title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A Google DeepMind retrospective marking 10 years since AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol at Go in March 2016. The video presents AlphaGo as a turning point that catalyzed the modern AI revolution, enabling subsequent breakthroughs in algorithmic discovery and scientific challenges like protein folding.
